---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  .landing-hero {
    padding: 5rem 0 3.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.12);
    margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }

  .landing-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.45);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .landing-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.8rem);
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin: 0 0 2rem;
    max-width: 720px;
  }

  .landing-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.65);
  }

  .landing-intro {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.75;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.72);
    max-width: 640px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .perspectives-label {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.35);
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .card-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.1);
    margin-bottom: 4rem;
  }

  .perspective-card {
    display: block;
    padding: 2rem 1.75rem;
    background: #272b30;
    text-decoration: none;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: background 0.2s ease;
  }

  .perspective-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: #e8e8e8;
    transition: width 0.3s ease;
  }

  .perspective-card:hover {
    background: #2e3338;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .perspective-card:hover::after {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .card-number {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.25);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    line-height: 1.3;
    margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
  }

  .card-teaser {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.52);
  }

  .card-arrow {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 1.25rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.3);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    transition: color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  .perspective-card:hover .card-arrow {
    color: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.7);
    transform: translateX(4px);
  }
</style>

<div class="landing-hero">
  <p class="landing-eyebrow">CS-E5480 Digital Ethics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Group Presentation</p>
  <h1 class="landing-title">Digital Piracy:<br><em>An Ethical Examination</em></h1>
  <p class="landing-intro">
    Piracy resists easy moral judgment. Depending on whose interests are foregrounded — the
    consumer priced out of fragmented platforms, the creator whose livelihood depends on
    compensation, or the buyer who discovers their "purchase" was only ever a licence — the same
    act can appear as a rational response, an ethical violation, or a symptom of a broken system.
    These three perspectives do not converge on a verdict; they map the terrain of a genuinely
    contested problem.
  </p>
</div>

<p class="perspectives-label">Three Perspectives</p>

<div class="card-grid">
  <a class="perspective-card" href="consumers.qmd">
    <p class="card-number">I</p>
    <p class="card-title">The Consumer's Perspective</p>
    <p class="card-teaser">How fragmented streaming landscapes and rising subscription costs reframe piracy as a rational — if not justifiable — choice.</p>
    <span class="card-arrow">Read &rarr;</span>
  </a>
  <a class="perspective-card" href="creators.qmd">
    <p class="card-number">II</p>
    <p class="card-title">The Creator's Perspective</p>
    <p class="card-teaser">Economic and moral rights under the Berne Convention, and what three philosophical frameworks reveal about the ethics of unpaid use.</p>
    <span class="card-arrow">Read &rarr;</span>
  </a>
  <a class="perspective-card" href="ownership.qmd">
    <p class="card-number">III</p>
    <p class="card-title">Ownership and Licensing</p>
    <p class="card-teaser">When clicking "Buy" delivers a revocable licence instead of property, the ethical calculus of piracy shifts in ways the law has not caught up with.</p>
    <span class="card-arrow">Read &rarr;</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
